title: hieracium orthocaulon
intro: Hieracium orthocaulon, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium orthocaulon include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Hieracium orthocaulon can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
